listeners.purpose: Pre-write hook: refuses User soft-delete when the User is sole guardian for a minor athlete.
Dispatches the auto-verify job immediately on guardian creation.
When the removed guardian was primary, auto-elects a new primary from remaining verified guardians.
When a revoked guardian was primary, auto-elects a new primary.

Wave 4+: after N permanent bounces on a guardian's User email (config.athlete_guardian.communications.bounce_threshold), auto-flips can_receive_communications to false + fires GuardianCommunicationsBounced.
Cascade delete via FK; writes compliance audit.

When an athlete archives (soft-delete), guardian rows remain but are effectively inactive (their is_active accessor returns false since athlete.status='archived'). No hard cascade — the rows stay for audit. On Athlete HARD-delete, the FK CASCADE takes over.
